title: Door County Getaway
subtitle: 3-day Wisconsin coast trip

team.note: Loose plan. Weather and ferry times can shuffle the days.

bring: Layers and a rain shell (lake weather turns fast)
Swimsuits and towels for Nicolet Bay Beach
Hiking shoes for the bluff trails

bookings.title: Pelletier's fish boil, dinner seating
bookings.note: The boil-over is at 6:30. Do not be late for it.

bookings.title: Eagle Bluff Lighthouse tour
bookings.note: Tours sell out in summer. Grab the noon slot before it fills.

bookings.title: Washington Island ferry
bookings.note: Stretch goal. Check the last return time before committing the day to it.

bookings.title: Kayak rental at Nicolet Bay
bookings.note: Called ahead. They will hold two boats if an afternoon slot opens up.

lists.title: The whole point
lists.note: Why we booked this trip. Do not leave without these.
items: Hike to the tower in Peninsula State Park
Watch a real Door County fish boil at Pelletier's
See the goats on the roof at Al Johnson's

lists.title: Bonus adventures
lists.note: Would be super awesome if the weather and time cooperate.

items.text: Kayak the shoreline from Nicolet Bay
Take the ferry to Washington Island

items: Catch sunset at the tip in Gills Rock

notes: Cherry season peaks in July. Grab a pie for the drive home.
Peninsula State Park needs a WI state park sticker at the gate.
Al Johnson's in Sister Bay has goats on the roof. Yes, really.

facts: Door County has 11 lighthouses, more than any other county in the United States.
A Door County fish boil ends with a giant fireball, when kerosene hits the pot and boils it over.
Al Johnson's restaurant really does keep live goats grazing on its grass roof.

trivia.q: What makes the big fireball at the end of a fish boil?
choices: Kerosene tossed on the fire to boil the pot over
trivia.fact: The boil-over carries the fishy foam up and out of the pot, so what is left tastes clean.

trivia.q: Door County has more of one thing than any other county in the country. What?
trivia.fact: Eleven of them, because the peninsula sticks far out into Lake Michigan and ships needed the help.

places.name: Whistling Swan Inn
places.desc: Home base for all three nights.

places.name: Peninsula State Park
places.desc: Trails, tower, and the golf course.

places.name: Nicolet Bay Beach
places.desc: Sandy swim beach and kayak rental.

places.name: Pelletier's Fish Boil
places.desc: The classic Door County fish boil.

places.name: Al Johnson's, Sister Bay
places.desc: Swedish pancakes. Goats on the roof.

places.name: Seaquist Orchards
places.desc: Cherry pies and jam for the road.

days.title: Arrive Fish Creek
notes: Check-in is 3pm. Park on Cottage Row if Main St is full.

days.title: Cave Point + drive home
days.closingNote: Safe drive home. Cherry pie for the road is mandatory.
